summary: Tested mobile-friendly fixes for Blendlink Pages module: 1) Bottom nav padding (pb-24), 2) Image upload URL format, 3) Product edit/delete endpoints. Backend: 11/11 tests PASSED. Frontend UI verified on mobile viewport (375x812).

minor.issue: Returns 403 if user is not the page owner - this is expected authorization behavior, not a bug

issues: 'Failed to load analytics' error banner shown (minor - known issue from iteration 135)

critical_code_review_comments: pb-24 padding class correctly applied to ItemsTab container (line 249 MemberPageDashboard.jsx)
Main content area has pb-28 padding (line 1016)
Image upload constructs full URL: const imageUrl = data.url.startsWith('http') ? data.url : `${API_URL}${data.url}` (line 430)
AddItemModal supports isEditMode with editItem prop for pre-filled data
updateProduct and deleteProduct API methods properly implemented in memberPagesApi.js
seed_data_creation: Created test products during backend testing (auto-cleanup via test design)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile fixes verified: 1) pb-24 padding on ItemsTab prevents bottom nav overlap - Add button position y=128.5px (well above 748px bottom nav), 2) Image upload endpoint POST /api/upload/image returns URL like /api/upload/files/{filename}, frontend code prepends API_URL if needed, 3) PUT /api/page-products/{page_id}/{product_id} and DELETE /api/page-products/{page_id}/{product_id} endpoints working correctly, 4) Pages link appears in More menu via [data-testid='more-menu-pages'].

bottom_nav_fix.implementation: pb-24 class on ItemsTab container, pb-28 on main content
bottom_nav_fix.verified_position: Add button y=128.5px, bottom nav ~748px, plenty of clearance

image_upload_url_format.frontend_handling: Prepends API_URL if URL doesn't start with http

edit_modal_prefill.implementation: AddItemModal accepts editItem prop, sets isEditMode=!!editItem, pre-fills formData from editItem
edit_modal_prefill.modal_title: Shows 'Edit Product' when editing vs 'Add Product'

mobile_viewport_tests.conclusion: Bottom nav does NOT block Add button or content

known_issues.analytics_error: Failed to load analytics error banner shown on page dashboard (known issue, minor)
known_issues.page_authorization: Users can only CRUD products on pages they own (expected behavior)
